title: Tiger of the Seven Seas
writer: Nino Battiferri, Luigi Capuano, Arpad DeRiso
actors: Gianna Maria Canale, Anthony Steel, Maria Grazia Spina
plot: Tigre is the skipper of the Santa Maria, a pirate-ship, but he feels tired and decides to leave the command of the ship. Unfortunately he has only a daughter, Consuelo. So he will leave the command and the ship to the winner of a ...
